backlogItems.title: Staging ownership backfill apply enablement
backlogItems.triggerCondition: Staging runbook/preflight/acceptance governance is complete and explicit staging write-path proposal is ready.
forbiddenShortcuts: Enable staging apply directly from CLI apply path.
Treat design-only artifacts as execution evidence.

backlogItems.title: Production ownership backfill apply enablement
backlogItems.triggerCondition: Accepted staging evidence and production promotion governance are complete with manual decision packet.
forbiddenShortcuts: Enable production apply without separate production ADR.
Reuse staging hashes/evidence as production execution approval.

backlogItems.title: Global EF query filter enablement
backlogItems.triggerCondition: Post-backfill enforcement strategy is proposed with compatibility and rollback plan.
forbiddenShortcuts: Add global HasQueryFilter as side effect of unrelated governance work.

backlogItems.title: DB row-level security enablement
backlogItems.triggerCondition: Operational ownership, migration, and rollback model for RLS are explicitly approved.
forbiddenShortcuts: Claim RLS enabled from governance-only docs.
Enable RLS without dedicated operational ADR.

backlogItems.title: External identity provider integration
backlogItems.triggerCondition: Identity integration requirements and rollout constraints are staged and reviewed.
forbiddenShortcuts: Claim enterprise identity posture without ADR and rollout evidence.

backlogItems.title: Production audit log persistence
backlogItems.triggerCondition: Audit persistence storage, retention, and tamper-evidence controls are designed and reviewed.
forbiddenShortcuts: Treat in-memory/dev audit logging as production-grade persistence evidence.

backlogItems.title: Full tenant isolation claim eligibility
backlogItems.triggerCondition: Persistence enforcement controls and cross-tenant evidence satisfy release-boundary criteria.
forbiddenShortcuts: Claim full tenant isolation while global filters and DB RLS are still deferred.

backlogItems.title: Post-backfill strict tenant enforcement
backlogItems.triggerCondition: Ownership backfill execution and validation evidence are complete and reviewed.
forbiddenShortcuts: Enable strict enforcement without explicit rollback and compatibility ADR.

nonClaims: No full multi-tenant isolation claim yet.
No global EF query filter claim.
